name: Nia
description: A dockhand coiling and recoiling the same length of rope by the canal, eyes going to the water every few seconds like she's timing something.
background: Worked the loading canal and the river barges; she can read a current and handle a boat in the dark.
personality: Restless, guarded, and pulled two ways — she wants out and can't quite take it.
secret: She has a fuelled skiff hidden in the reeds and is deciding, a little more each day, whether to leave alone.
notes: T45 · The Ironworks. Skill: boats/water. Hook: the hidden skiff is a real escape asset and a loyalty test (desert vs share).
